title: Why RAVE Went Up Yesterday
summary: RaveDAO was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 77.7% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 77.7% move.
Roughly $651M in 24-hour trading volume suggests active short-term participation.
The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.

title: Why ALPACA Went Up Yesterday
summary: ALPACA was one of the strongest Binance Futures movers yesterday, gaining 391.2% over 24 hours.
reasons: ALPACA posted a 391.2% 24-hour gain, making it one of the strongest Binance Futures movers.
Trading activity remained elevated, with roughly $2.91B in quote volume.
The move may have been driven by short-term momentum traders and increased speculative interest.
